name: tailwind-styled-v4-monorepo
description: Monorepo for tailwind-styled-v4 — compiler-driven, RSC-aware styling

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/animate -w packages/theme -w packages/plugin -w packages/preset -w packages/compiler -w packages/scanner -w packages/engine -w packages/cli -w packages/devtools -w packages/runtime-css -w packages/vite -w packages/rspack && npm run build -w packages/next -w packages/core && npm run build -w examples/next-app
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/animate -w packages/theme -w packages/plugin -w packages/preset -w packages/compiler -w packages/scanner -w packages/engine -w packages/cli -w packages/devtools -w packages/runtime-css -w packages/vite -w packages/rspack && npm run build -w packages/next -w packages/core
scripts.build:stage1: npm run build -w packages/animate -w packages/theme -w packages/plugin -w packages/preset -w packages/compiler -w packages/scanner -w packages/engine -w packages/cli -w packages/devtools -w packages/runtime-css -w packages/vite -w packages/rspack
scripts.release:alpha:check: npm run build:packages && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
